features.name: action_pure_rotation
features.source:

features.name: action_pure_translation

    return (abs(a[0]) > 2 * max(abs(a[2]), abs(a[3]), abs(a[4])) or abs(a[1]) > 2 * max(abs(a[2]), abs(a[3]), abs(a[4])))

features.name: action_pure_arm

    return abs(a[4]) > 2 * max(abs(a[0]), abs(a[1]), abs(a[2]), abs(a[3]))
